productDisplayName: Puma Men Drifter Road Black Flip Flops
description: Walk through your everyday casual hours in absolute comfort in this pair of flip flops from puma. With an ergonomically curved and padded footbed, and a grippy outsole, stay safe and comfortable on all kinds of surfaces.UpperWide synthetic leather straps with a toe separator and inner lining in twill tapeErgonomically padded footbed for all day comfortPuma branding on the forefoot and heelEmbossed honeycomb pattern on footbedOutsoleTPR outsole with tyre tread pattern for absolute grip and tractionFlip flop careWipe surface with a clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
